title: Valve launches Steam Machine with controversial specifications and sells out in Japan
summary: Valve's console sells in Japan despite criticism over its price, single-channel memory, and change in 4K promise.

title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices due to RAM memory crisis
summary: The increases affect the entire line, including the MacBook Neo, due to rising NAND and DRAM costs.

title: GTA 6 to launch with disc-less physical edition and high prices
summary: Rockstar confirms the price of 79.99 euros, pre-order, disc version, and Sony's statements about PS5.

title: French retailer mocks Steam Machine price with its 'Stim Machine'
summary: LDLC offers a PC RX 9060 XT for 999 euros, criticizing the value of Valve's console.

title: 3D printing allows building a Steam Machine with RTX 5060
summary: The community creates alternatives to Valve's console using 3D-printed cases and SteamOS with AMD graphics.

title: ASUS restores TSME encryption on AM5 motherboards with beta BIOS
summary: The company reacts to criticism and restores compatibility with memory encryption on its motherboards.

title: Microsoft raises Xbox Series X/S price for the third time and discontinues 2 TB model
summary: The increases range between $100 and $150, continuing the upward trend of recent years.

title: Deals to avoid Apple's MacBook Neo price increases
summary: Retailers offer discounts of up to $500 on current models before the increases.

title: IBM unveils 0.7nm chip with 50% more performance than 2nm chips
summary: IBM's NanoStack technology breaks the nanometer barrier with a 7-angstrom chip.

title: Qualcomm unveils HBC near-memory architecture for AI
summary: The new technology offers 133 TB/s bandwidth and six times more efficiency than HBM.

title: Micron secures $100 billion in supply agreements and warns RAM crisis will continue
summary: Micron reports record results and sets high prices for the next five years.

title: AMD updates FSR SDK 2.3 with Ray Regeneration and showcases FSR 4.1 performance
summary: The new versions of AMD's upscaling improve image quality and offer performance gains on RDNA 3.

title: Framework updates its laptops with ADATA SSDs and announces CPU price increases
summary: The company changes SSD supplier and anticipates processor price hikes.

title: AceMagic offers up to 20% discount on its AMD Ryzen Mini PCs
summary: The promotion includes exclusive coupons to purchase these compact PCs at a reduced price.

title: Prime Day 2026 deals on monitors, motherboards, and peripherals
summary: The sales include discounts on gaming monitors, GIGABYTE motherboards, and accessories like the Corsair Xeneon Edge.

title: Qualcomm and Meta sign multigenerational deal for data center CPUs
summary: The strategic collaboration will span several generations of processors for cloud AI.

title: New retro devices arrive: 8BitDo launches N64 collection and Ayaneo unveils Pocket Micro 2
summary: Manufacturers bet on classic design in controllers and handheld consoles.

title: Tim Sweeney criticizes Steam over AI tags and advocates for interconnected game economies
summary: The CEO of Epic Games speaks out on content moderation and the future of video games.

title: Riot Vanguard removes its requirement for constant execution for anti-cheat
summary: The new on-demand mode requires a strict Windows 11 security stack.

title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil Jalapeño, their first chip for language inference
summary: The custom chip will accelerate language models with greater efficiency.
